title: Wear OS ambient mode: keep QR visible when screen dims
description: AmbientAware does not exist in wear-compose-foundation or wear-compose-material3 at 1.5.0. Needs AmbientLifecycleObserver from androidx.wear:wear (add dep to app/build.gradle.kts). Register observer in QrCodeDetailScreen, track isAmbient state, show black bg + QR-only in ambient. FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON already prevents dimming so this is enhancement-only.
close_reason: AmbientLifecycleObserver from androidx.wear:wear 1.3.0; ambient=black bg+QR only, interactive=white bg+name+QR

title: CI: auto-increment versionCode from git commit count
description: Replace hardcoded versionCode=1 in both build.gradle.kts with providers.exec { commandLine("git","rev-list","--count","HEAD") }.standardOutput.asText.get().trim().toInt(). Works for local debug and CI release builds.
close_reason: Done in both app and mobile build.gradle.kts

title: Wear OS tile: quick-access QR code from watch face
description: DashCodeTileService using Horologist tiles. Tile shows pinned code name; tap launches detail screen. Pinned code configured via DataStore/companion. Tile updates on change via TileService.getUpdater. Declared in AndroidManifest.
close_reason: DashCodeTileService with tiles:1.3.0+protolayout:1.2.0; shows first code on teal tile, tap deep-links to detail, refreshes on sync

title: Companion app: drag-to-reorder codes
description: Add sortOrder: Int to QrCode/PhoneQrCode; Room schema version bump. LazyColumn drag-to-reorder in companion app. Persist to DataStore and re-sync to watch. Watch respects user-defined order. Survives restart on both devices.

title: Code type labels: show URL / WiFi / Text badge on list items
description: Derive CodeType sealed class (Url, Wifi, Text) from content string. Url: starts with http(s)://, Wifi: starts with WIFI:, Text: everything else. Small chip per row in QrCodeListScreen and companion app list. No network calls.
close_reason: CodeType sealed class + detectCodeType in both modules; badges in watch row and companion SuggestionChip

title: App icon: design and implement proper launcher icon
description: Icon needed at mdpi/hdpi/xhdpi/xxhdpi/xxxhdpi for both :app and :mobile. Watch round icon must render cleanly at 48dp on circular watch launcher. Adaptive icon (foreground+background) for Android 8+. QR/scan theme recognisable at small sizes. No placeholder assets remaining.
close_reason: Adaptive icon added (mipmap-anydpi-v26): teal background + QR finder-pattern foreground vector
